title: lobelia collaris
intro: Lobelia collaris, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant native to North America, classified in the family Campanulaceae, and is a perennial herb with medicinal properties. Traditionally, Lobelia has been used for its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma by loosening and removing mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of Lobelia include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lobelia, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
